parameters.pythonCode:
import os
import shlex
import subprocess
from datetime import datetime, timezone


def _pick_script_path() -> str:
    candidates = [
        "/files/yf-enrichment-v1/daily_enrichment.py",
        "/workspace/yf-enrichment-v1/daily_enrichment.py",
        "/opt/trader-ia/yf-enrichment-v1/daily_enrichment.py",
    ]
    for p in candidates:
        if os.path.exists(p):
            return p
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "daily_enrichment.py introuvable. Chemins testes: " + ", ".join(candidates)
    )


script_path = _pick_script_path()

cmd = [
    "python",
    script_path,
    "--yf-enrich-db-path",
    os.getenv("YF_ENRICH_DB_PATH", "/files/duckdb/yf_enrichment_v1.duckdb"),
    "--ag2-db-path",
    os.getenv("AG2_DUCKDB_PATH", "/files/duckdb/ag2_v2.duckdb"),
    "--yf-api-url",
    os.getenv("YFINANCE_API_URL", "http://yfinance-api:8080"),
    "--target-days",
    os.getenv("YF_ENRICH_OPTIONS_TARGET_DAYS", "30"),
    "--quote-chunk-size",
    os.getenv("YF_ENRICH_QUOTE_CHUNK", "80"),
    "--timeout-sec",
    os.getenv("YF_ENRICH_TIMEOUT_SEC", "14"),
]

proc = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)

stdout = (proc.stdout or "")
stderr = (proc.stderr or "")

result = {
    "at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    "status": "OK" if proc.returncode == 0 else "ERROR",
    "exitCode": int(proc.returncode),
    "command": " ".join(shlex.quote(c) for c in cmd),
    "stdout": stdout[-12000:],
    "stderr": stderr[-12000:],
}

if proc.returncode != 0:
    raise RuntimeError(f"daily_enrichment failed rc={proc.returncode} stderr={stderr[-500:]}")

return [{"json": result}]
